Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, min(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * 1) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh__min" FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/a6bba27b24a36ae24bec774674c58182b21dc9bdbc6b76d67a3466a55d4f90ff/84e95a27-aa63-49b0-9763-713feb2968e9/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
